title: • They may select their final boss or bypass it entirely.
content:
• They may select their final boss or bypass it entirely.
• This allows them to shape their own narrative ending.

✔ Option 3: “The Archivist’s Secret”
• The top XP earner receives a previously locked reading or challenge.
• This gives them a unique text or assignment that no other student saw.
• The class never finds out what they received.

📜 Which Option Works Best?
✔ Do we allow them to alter the game mechanics (Option 1)?
✔ Do we let them control their own final challenge (Option 2)?
✔ Do we give them exclusive hidden knowledge (Option 3)?

✅ Why This Matters:
• Keeps the XP race meaningful through the last week.
• Prevents the top player from feeling like they “hit a ceiling.”
• Adds an aura of mystery and prestige to the final unlock.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 251 (chunk 251/555)
